# modelviewMatrix

**Instance Property**

The matrix used to transform position coordinates from world space to eye space.

## Declaration

```swift
var modelviewMatrix: GLKMatrix4 { get set }
```

## Configuring Modelview Properties

- **normalMatrix**: The matrix used to transform normal coordinates from world space to eye space.

items.description: The matrix used to transform normal coordinates from world space to eye space.
